name: From Geneva: Day trip wine tour and Chillon Castle
description: Discover From Geneva: Day trip wine tour and Chillon Castle in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover From Geneva: Day trip wine tour and Chillon Castle in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Day trips
subcategory.description: Find and book a day trip by bus through beautiful Swiss landscapes. Get on and let's go. You don't have to worry about any tedious organization on a day trip and can instead enjoy the ride to the fullest while being chauffeured to your excursion destination. Switzerland's well-developed road network allows excursions to all popular places and natural beauties

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online

gallery.alternativeText: Wine tour: Participants enjoy a wine tasting in Lavaux with a view of Lake Geneva and vineyards.
Wine tour: Discover the vineyards in Lavaux with views of Lake Geneva and the Alps.
Wine tour: Experience the vineyards in Lavaux and Lake Geneva with a picturesque view.
Wine Tour: Discover the picturesque vineyards in Lavaux with stunning views of Lake Geneva.
Wine tour: enjoy the vines of Lavaux with a view of Lake Geneva, ideal for wine lovers.
Wine Tour: Explore the vineyards of Lavaux with breathtaking views of Lake Geneva.
Wine tour: Experience the vineyards of Lavaux with a view of the lake and the Alps during the summer.
